description: An ERROR log entry or thrown exception indicating a failure or unexpected condition in a service.

symptom_type.description: Fixed value identifying the symptom category

service.description: The service or component that produced the error/exception

event.description: Brief description of the error or exception event

regex.description: Python regex pattern matching the log line that contains the error/exception

line.description: Line number in the log file

timestamp.description: Timestamp of the event extracted from the log line
